title: dollinera sambuensis
intro: Dollinera sambuensis, a type of flowering plant, is a species in the Rubiaceae family native to New Caledonia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dollinera sambuensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of Dollinera sambuensis often involve the use of its leaves, stems, and roots in teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
